variants.semantic_only: Dense vector search in Qdrant using the configured embedding model.
variants.bm25_only: Lexical BM25 search over the same PostgreSQL chunk corpus.
variants.hybrid_rrf: Dense candidates and BM25 candidates fused with RRF using k=60.

failed_cases.query: Explain what an Activity is in Android and how it relates to the user interface.
What are SharedPreferences and which access methods are described?

mermaid:
```mermaid
xychart-beta
    title "TeacherLM RAG Retrieval Comparison"
    x-axis ["Semantic only", "BM25 only", "Hybrid RRF"]
    y-axis "Score" 0 --> 1
    bar "recall@5" [0.714, 0.506, 0.699]
    bar "mrr@5" [0.923, 0.705, 0.833]
    bar "ndcg@5" [0.723, 0.519, 0.702]
```

semantic_only.query: What is a smartphone and what features make it different from a basic mobile phone?
Compare native mobile development with hybrid mobile applications.
What are the main components of an Android application?
Explain what an Activity is in Android and how it relates to the user interface.
When is onRestart called in the Android activity lifecycle?
How do Intents allow communication between Android activities?
What is AndroidManifest.xml used for and how is a new activity declared?
What are res/drawable and res/layout resources in Android?
How is style.xml used with @style in Android layouts?
Why does Android use SQLiteOpenHelper and what methods must be implemented?
Show the CREATE TABLE syntax used by SQLite in the Android course.
How are ContentValues used to insert data with SQLiteDatabase insert?
What are SharedPreferences and which access methods are described?
